videos.title: Cross-country skiing at Forbush Corner
videos.description:
Forbush Corner in Frederic, Michigan offers cross-country skiers over 35km of ski trails. 

How to have an awesome winter day in Gaylord: https://www.mlive.com/life-and-culture/j66j-2020/01/3d632c20c97555/how-to-spend-a-michigans-best-day-in-gaylord.html
